_install_notes.cloudinary: uploads incident photos directly to Cloudinary; requires CLOUDINARY_URL
_install_notes.multer: parses multipart incident photo uploads in memory
_install_notes.nodemailer: npm i nodemailer  — enables email notifications (requires SMTP config in .env)
_install_notes.web-push: npm i web-push  — enables Web Push browser notifications (requires VAPID keys in .env)
